title: Looking for Category Manager at Treebo Hotels

jsonLd.title: Looking for Category Manager at Treebo Hotels
jsonLd.description:
Join the Treebo Hotels family as a Category Manager in Thane. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Treebo Hotels:
Treebo Hotels is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Data Analytics

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Treebo Hotels!
